blog.spotlightTitle: Sustainable Construction: Green Building Certification and LEED Standards
blog.spotlightBodyPrimary: Sustainable construction is becoming an increasingly important standard in terms of energy efficiency, water conservation and healthy indoor environments. LEED (Leadership in Energy and Environmental Design) certification is an international reference system that certifies buildings as environmentally friendly.
blog.spotlightBodySecondary: At Vista Construction, we aim to integrate sustainable material selection and energy-efficient design principles into every project we undertake. Achieving sustainability goals is not possible without proper planning from the start — which is why we plan an eco-conscious approach for each project from day one.
blog.insightText: Green building standards, certification process and the value it adds to your project

legal.title: Legal
legal.privacyDesc: Overview of how Vista İnşaat handles contact, quotation and technical project data.
legal.privacyContent:
Vista İnşaat uses submitted contact and quotation data only to evaluate requests, prepare offers and maintain project communication.

We do not request unnecessary personal data and we limit access to project files, drawings and technical documents to relevant operational teams.

For data updates or removal requests, you can contact us via the communication details provided on the contact page.
legal.termsDesc: General terms for using the Vista İnşaat website, technical content and quotation communication channels.
legal.termsContent:
Information published on this website is provided for general technical and commercial guidance. Final product scope, material selection and production conditions are clarified during project review.

Visuals, technical notes and descriptions on the site do not constitute a final binding offer on their own.

All quotation and delivery commitments become valid only after mutual confirmation within the commercial process.
